text.title: strict-mode-required-fields Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the strict-mode audit report produced when running this methodology against a model file.

list.item: `target` is one of the closed enum values.
Every `code` is in the closed enum; no freeform error codes.
If `violations` is empty AND `ci_assert_present == true` → safe to ship.
If `violations` is non-empty AND `patches` is empty → audit incomplete.
